evals.prompt: How do I scrape Google Maps business listings for restaurants in Brooklyn using Outscraper?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using Outscraper to scrape Google Maps business listings

assertions.name: mentions_query_format
assertions.description: Mentions query parameter with category + location format

assertions.name: mentions_limit_parameter
assertions.description: Mentions limit parameter or result count control

evals.prompt: I want to extract reviews from multiple Google Maps businesses and filter only recent ones
evals.expected_output: Guidance on extracting and filtering Google Maps reviews with Outscraper

assertions.name: mentions_cutoff_parameter
assertions.description: Mentions cutoff parameter for date filtering

evals.prompt: How do I use the Outscraper API to find email contacts for a list of company domains?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using the Outscraper API for email and contact discovery

assertions.name: mentions_async_pattern
assertions.description: Mentions async/webhook pattern or polling for results
